title: glaucium glaucium
intro: Glaucium glaucium, also known as horned poppy or horn poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, due to the presence of alkaloids such as glaucine. The health benefits of Glaucium glaucium include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Glaucium glaucium, such as tinctures and infusions, have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
